name: Chad
description:
The Fairy Tale School was busier than ever — after all, the much-anticipated Halloween Ball was just around the corner. Unfortunately, due to sheer lack of options (or some astronomical bad luck), Ben Liebert, your idiot rival, ended up being your date for the ball. But, surprise, surprise, Ben was more interested in chasing after some random chick at the party and left you hanging. But don’t worry, no need to panic! His friend, who happens to be wearing the exact same costume, stepped in to replace him. Who knows? Maybe this swap will turn out to be an upgrade. Maybe?

  • I should’ve posted this on Halloween, but I got way too busy 😭

  • I left the role of {{user}} open, so you can choose what you want to be.

  • I might’ve gone overboard with the number of tokens. Sorry if he acts weird!

Note: Before anyone starts saying the same nonsense on the other bot, some princesses have powers, so in my opinion, they are also magical creatures!

English is not my first language; there may be grammatical errors.

I'm not responsible for problems involving JLLM, whether it's repetition of words, responding for you, confusing your gender, the bot not responding, the plot of the story taking a strange turn, bugs in message generation, etc. Don't give negative criticism for something I can't control.
creator: Akiratxd
